children.text: Introduction (Personal Info)
children.cn: 介绍（个人信息）

children.text: My name is Liu Bo, and I am a 13-year-old middle school student.
children.cn: 我的名字叫刘波，我是一名13岁的初中生。
children.explanation: 句子中明确说明他是初中生（middle school student），而不是高中生（high school student）。
children.keywords: name, Liu Bo, middle school, student

children.text: I am tall and I have short hair.
children.cn: 我很高，留着短发。
children.notes: tall: 高的; short hair: 短发
children.explanation: 刘波留着短发（short hair），而不是长发。

children.text: My favorite hobby is reading books, and I also like playing basketball.
children.cn: 我最喜欢的爱好是看书，我也喜欢打篮球。
children.notes: favorite hobby: 最喜欢的爱好; read books: 看书; play basketball: 打篮球
children.statement: 刘波最喜欢的爱好是打篮球。
children.explanation: 他最喜欢的爱好是看书（reading books），打篮球只是他也喜欢的一个运动。

children.text: Daily Activities (Routines)
children.cn: 日常活动（例行公事）

children.text: My daily routine starts early because I get up at half past six.
children.cn: 我的日常生活开始得很早，因为我六点半起床。
children.notes: daily routine: 日常生活；例行公事; get up: 起床; half past six: 六点半
children.explanation: 刘波在六点半起床（half past six），所以他的日常生活开始得很早。
children.keywords: daily routine, early, get up, half past six

children.text: Before breakfast, I quickly brush my teeth and get dressed.
children.cn: 在吃早饭前，我快速刷牙并穿好衣服。
children.notes: before: 在……之前; brush teeth: 刷牙; get dressed: 穿衣服
children.statement: 刘波在穿衣服之前吃早餐。
children.explanation: 刘波是在吃早餐之前（Before breakfast）刷牙和穿衣服的。
children.keywords: before breakfast, brush, teeth, get dressed

children.text: I usually go to school at a quarter past seven.
children.cn: 我通常在七点一刻去上学。
children.notes: usually: 通常; a quarter past seven: 七点一刻（7:15）
children.explanation: 刘波是在七点一刻（a quarter past seven，即7:15）去上学的。
children.keywords: usually, go to school, quarter past seven

children.text: I have lunch at school, and my classes finish at five o'clock.
children.cn: 我在学校吃午饭，我的课在五点钟结束。
children.notes: have lunch: 吃午餐; finish: 结束
children.explanation: 刘波在学校吃午饭（have lunch at school），而不是回家吃。

children.text: Feelings & Homework
children.cn: 感受与作业

children.text: In the evening, I always try to make good use of my time.
children.cn: 在晚上，我总是努力好好利用我的时间。
children.notes: in the evening: 在晚上; make good use of: 好好利用; time: 时间
children.statement: “make good use of” 意为“好好利用”。
children.explanation: make good use of 是固定搭配，意为“好好利用”或“善用”。
children.keywords: evening, always, make good use of, time

children.text: I do my homework first and then read some books.
children.cn: 我先做作业，然后读一些书。
children.notes: do homework: 做家庭作业; first: 首先; then: 然后
children.statement: 刘波做完作业后再看书。
children.explanation: 他首先做作业（do homework first），然后才看书（then read some books）。

children.text: I think my daily life is very busy but interesting.
children.cn: 我认为我的日常生活非常忙碌但很有趣。
children.notes: think: 认为，觉得; busy: 忙碌的; interesting: 有趣的
children.statement: 刘波觉得他的日常生活很无聊。
children.explanation: 刘波觉得他的生活虽然忙碌（busy），但是很有趣（interesting）。

tree.text: A Day in the Life of a Chinese Student

children.text: Introduction (Personal Info)
children.cn: 介绍（个人信息）

children.text: My name is Liu Bo, a thirteen-year-old middle school student who is tall and has short hair.
children.cn: 我的名字叫刘波，是一个高个子、留着短发的十三岁初中生。
children.notes: thirteen-year-old: 13岁的; who is tall and has short hair: 关系代词who引导定语从句，修饰student
children.statement: 句子中的 'who' 引导定语从句修饰 'student'。
children.explanation: 'who is tall and has short hair' 是定语从句，修饰前面的先行词 'student'。
children.keywords: Liu Bo, thirteen-year-old, middle school student, tall, short hair

children.text: Although I have a lot of schoolwork, my favorite hobby is reading books, and I also enjoy playing basketball.
children.cn: 虽然我有很多学业任务，但我最喜欢的爱好是看书，而且我也喜欢打篮球。
children.notes: Although: 虽然; schoolwork: 学业，学校作业; enjoy playing: 享受/喜欢打（球）
children.statement: “Although” 引导让步状语从句，不能与 “but” 连用在同一个句子中。
children.explanation: 在英语中，although（虽然）和 but（但是）不能同时连用在一个完整的句子中。
children.keywords: Although, schoolwork, favorite hobby, enjoy, basketball

children.text: Daily Activities (Routines)
children.cn: 日常活动（例行公事）

children.text: My daily routine starts early in the morning, as I usually get up at half past six.
children.cn: 我的日常生活早上开始得很早，因为我通常在六点半起床。
children.notes: daily routine: 日常生活; as: 因为，由于，引导原因状语从句; half past six: 六点半
children.statement: 句中的 'as' 相当于 'because'，表示原因。
children.explanation: 在此句中，'as' 引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”，用来解释为什么日常生活开始得早。
children.keywords: daily routine, early, as, get up, half past six

children.text: Before having a quick breakfast, I always brush my teeth and get dressed as fast as possible.
children.cn: 在吃一顿简单的早餐之前，我总是尽可能快地刷牙并穿好衣服。
children.notes: Before having breakfast: 在吃早餐前（Before为介词，后接动名词形式）; as fast as possible: 尽可能快地
children.statement: “as fast as possible” 意为“尽可能慢地”。
children.explanation: “as fast as possible” 意为“尽可能快地”（fast意为快速的）。
children.keywords: before, quick breakfast, brush teeth, get dressed, fast

children.text: In order to arrive on time, I go to school at a quarter past seven and stay there until five o'clock when classes finish.
children.cn: 为了准时到达，我于七点一刻去上学，并留在那里直到五点钟放学。
children.notes: In order to: 为了; arrive on time: 准时到达; until: 直到; when classes finish: 关系副词when引导定语从句修饰time
children.statement: “In order to” 后面应该接动词原形来表示目的。
children.explanation: in order to 意为“为了”，后面接动词不定式（动词原形）作目的状语。
children.keywords: in order to, arrive, go to school, until, finish

children.text: Feelings & Homework
children.cn: 感受与作业

children.text: In the evening, I always try to make good use of my time so that I can finish my homework early.
children.cn: 在晚上，我总是努力好好利用我的时间，以便能够早点完成作业。
children.notes: make good use of: 好好利用; so that: 以便，为了，引导目的状语从句
children.statement: “so that” 在这里引导的是结果状语从句。
children.explanation: “so that” 在这里意为“以便，为了”，引导的是目的状语从句，说明好好利用时间的目的。
children.keywords: evening, make good use of, time, so that, finish

children.text: After that, I will spend some time reading books, which helps me learn more about the world.
children.cn: 在那之后，我会花一些时间来看书，这有助于我了解更多关于世界的事。
children.notes: spend time doing: 花时间做某事; which helps me: 非限制性定语从句，修饰前面“读书”这整件事
children.statement: “spend time doing sth.” 意为“花时间做某事”。
children.explanation: spend + 时间 + (in) doing sth. 是固定句型，表示在做某事上花费时间。
children.keywords: spend time, reading, which helps, learn, world

children.text: In short, although my daily life is busy, I find it extremely interesting and meaningful.
children.cn: 简而言之，虽然我的日常生活很忙，但我发现它非常有趣且有意义。
children.notes: In short: 简言之，总之; find it + adj.: 发现它……; extremely: 极其，非常; meaningful: 有意义的
children.explanation: “meaningful” 是形容词，意为“有意义的”。其副词形式是 “meaningfully”。
children.keywords: in short, although, busy, find it, extremely, meaningful
